scoring_dimensions.test_coverage: weight 20% — inverse: no tests = high risk

ranked_seams.name: Persistence / Repository Layer
ranked_seams.rationale: Four backend implementations (JPA, MongoDB, Redis, in-memory) behind a single interface, selected by Spring profiles that read Cloud Foundry VCAP_SERVICES at runtime. Extracting this without breaking profile-switching logic requires significant refactoring of both the config layer and the domain model's JPA annotations.
ranked_seams.recommendation: Extract last — high risk, needs refactor first

ranked_seams.name: Application Configuration
ranked_seams.rationale: SpringApplicationContextInitializer hard-codes Cloud Foundry VCAP_SERVICES parsing to wire the correct datasource bean; RedisConfig adds Lettuce connection pooling on top. Zero unit tests and tight coupling to CF environment variables make this extremely fragile to move.
ranked_seams.recommendation: Extract last — high risk, needs refactor first

ranked_seams.name: Domain Model
ranked_seams.rationale: Album carries both JPA annotations (@Entity, @Id) and is reused as-is for MongoDB — a dual-purpose POJO that ties the domain model to two different persistence strategies. Any extraction must resolve this annotation conflict before the seam can stand alone.
ranked_seams.recommendation: Extract after low-risk seams are stable

ranked_seams.name: Web / API Layer
ranked_seams.rationale: AlbumController calls the repository interface directly with no service layer in between; ErrorController and InfoController are stateless. Extractable once the repository interface is stable, but the lack of a service layer means business logic would need to be introduced during extraction.
ranked_seams.recommendation: Extract after low-risk seams are stable

ranked_seams.name: Bootstrap / Seed Data
ranked_seams.rationale: AlbumRepositoryPopulator only seeds demo data on startup and has no production dependencies — it is a pure dev/demo concern. Can be extracted or deleted with zero impact on any other seam.
ranked_seams.recommendation: Extract first — low coupling and risk
